title: 410 gone
description: An Alpha-flavored modpack with light horror elements.
body:
> The content you are looking for no longer exists.

An Alpha-flavored modpack inspired by wounded-minecraft-screenshots on tumblr, with themes of loneliness, grief, and isolation. The world has been consumed by sorrow.

**Contains light horror and ARG elements.**

This modpack is in early development, and as such, many of its ARG features are incomplete.

(Icon made by @riverrflower)
## **READ SPOILER BEFORE PLAYING PLEASE**

<details>
<summary>READ ME!!!</summary>
THINGS TO KEEP IN MIND BEFORE PLAYING:


  - shaders are extremely dark, specifically at nighttime, caves, and indoors. unfortunately this is a side effect of the shaders that i cannot fix. i strongly recommend you play with cheats enabled and with night vision permanently enabled (potion particles have also been removed via the resource pack).
  
- to craft a furnace, you need to craft a 'stonecutter', which is made using 4 cobblestone, much in the manner of a crafting table.
 
- this modpack is in early development and as such is subject to change. expect issues.

please feel free to contact me with any feedback, issues, or questions.

</details>

A very, very special thank you to @riverrflower for inspiring me.
